state.title: Test rate policy with commonjs

part.text:
All good. Here's what was done:

- **`src/rates.js`** — Added `HANDLING_RATE_POLICY`, a centralised array of `{threshold, fee}` objects defining all handling fee tiers. Refactored `handlingForSubtotal` to use `Array.find()` against the policy instead of hardcoded `if` chains. Exported the policy for external visibility.

- **`package.json`** (new) — Set `"type": "commonjs"` to match other benchmark runs, since the code uses CommonJS.

The policy is now a single data structure at `src/rates.js:1-5` — to change rates you only edit those five lines, not the function logic.
